clusters.canonical_sql: SELECT * FROM RAW.STRIPE.PAYMENTS WHERE CREATED_AT >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE)

SELECT T1.REGION_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('DAY', T0.ORDER_DATE), SUM(T0.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT T0.CUSTOMER_ID), COUNT(*) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T0 JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_REGIONS AS T1 ON T0.REGION_ID = T1.REGION_ID WHERE T0.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) AND T0.ORDER_STATUS = '?' GROUP BY T1.REGION_NAME, DATE_TRUNC('DAY', T0.ORDER_DATE) ORDER BY DAY DESC, DAILY_REVENUE DESC

SELECT T0.ORDER_ID, T0.ORDER_DATE, T0.ORDER_STATUS, T0.TOTAL_AMOUNT, T1.CUSTOMER_NAME, T1.EMAIL, T1.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, T2.REGION_NAME, T3.PRODUCT_ID, T3.QUANTITY, T3.UNIT_PRICE, T3.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT, T4.PRODUCT_NAME, T4.PRODUCT_CATEGORY FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T0 JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_REGIONS AS T2 ON T0.REGION_ID = T2.REGION_ID JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDER_ITEMS AS T3 ON T0.ORDER_ID = T3.ORDER_ID JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_PRODUCTS AS T4 ON T3.PRODUCT_ID = T4.PRODUCT_ID WHERE T0.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE)

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T0.ORDER_DATE), COUNT(DISTINCT T0.ORDER_ID), COUNT(DISTINCT T0.CUSTOMER_ID), SUM(T0.TOTAL_AMOUNT), SUM(T0.TOTAL_AMOUNT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT T0.CUSTOMER_ID), ?) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T0 WHERE T0.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) AND T0.ORDER_STATUS = '?' GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T0.ORDER_DATE) ORDER BY WEEK DESC

SELECT T2.PRODUCT_CATEGORY, T2.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', T1.ORDER_DATE), SUM(T0.QUANTITY), SUM(T0.QUANTITY * T0.UNIT_PRICE), SUM(T0.QUANTITY * (T0.UNIT_PRICE - T2.COST_PRICE)), COUNT(DISTINCT T1.CUSTOMER_ID) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDER_ITEMS AS T0 JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.ORDER_ID = T1.ORDER_ID JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_PRODUCTS AS T2 ON T0.PRODUCT_ID = T2.PRODUCT_ID WHERE T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T2.PRODUCT_CATEGORY, T2.PRODUCT_SUBCATEGORY, DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', T1.ORDER_DATE) ORDER BY GROSS_REVENUE DESC

SELECT T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_NAME, T0.EMAIL, T0.SIGNUP_DATE, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, COUNT(T1.ORDER_ID), SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), MAX(T1.ORDER_DATE), DATEDIFF(DAY, MAX(T1.ORDER_DATE), CURRENT_DATE) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_NAME, T0.EMAIL, T0.SIGNUP_DATE, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT ORDER BY LIFETIME_VALUE DESC LIMIT ?

SELECT EVENT_DATE, EVENT_TYPE, PLATFORM, COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM ANALYTICS.PRODUCT.FACT_EVENTS WHERE EVENT_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) AND EVENT_TYPE IN ('?', '?', '?', '?') GROUP BY EVENT_DATE, EVENT_TYPE, PLATFORM ORDER BY EVENT_DATE DESC

SELECT T0.UTM_SOURCE, T0.UTM_MEDIUM, T0.UTM_CAMPAIGN, COUNT(DISTINCT T0.SESSION_ID), COUNT(DISTINCT T0.USER_ID), SUM(CASE WHEN T0.CONVERTED THEN ? ELSE ? END), CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T0.CONVERTED THEN ? ELSE ? END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT T0.USER_ID), ?), SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT) FROM MARKETING.PUBLIC.SESSIONS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.USER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE = T0.SESSION_DATE WHERE T0.SESSION_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.UTM_SOURCE, T0.UTM_MEDIUM, T0.UTM_CAMPAIGN ORDER BY ATTRIBUTED_REVENUE DESC NULLS LAST
SELECT * FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = ?

SELECT MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(T1.ORDER_ID), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT

SELECT T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, DATEDIFF(DAY, T0.SIGNUP_DATE, CURRENT_DATE), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ORDER_STATUS = '?' THEN ? ELSE ? END), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), MAX(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), COUNT(DISTINCT T1.REGION_ID), STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, T0.CUSTOMER_ID

SELECT STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, MAX(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT T1.REGION_ID), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ORDER_STATUS = '?' THEN ? ELSE ? END), COUNT(T1.ORDER_ID), T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), DATEDIFF(DAY, T0.SIGNUP_DATE, CURRENT_DATE) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT

SELECT SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT T1.REGION_ID), MAX(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(T1.ORDER_ID), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, DATEDIFF(DAY, T0.SIGNUP_DATE, CURRENT_DATE), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ORDER_STATUS = '?' THEN ? ELSE ? END) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_ID, T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT
SELECT * FROM RAW.STRIPE.PAYMENTS WHERE CREATED_AT >= '?'

SELECT MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ORDER_STATUS = '?' THEN ? ELSE ? END), COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT

SELECT T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), MAX(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(T1.ORDER_ID), MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ORDER_STATUS = '?' THEN ? ELSE ? END), STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, T0.CUSTOMER_ID

SELECT FAILURE_MESSAGE, FAILURE_CODE, METADATA, CUSTOMER_ID, RECEIPT_URL, FEE_AMOUNT, NET_AMOUNT, DESCRIPTION, PAYMENT_ID, PAYMENT_STATUS, UPDATED_AT FROM RAW.STRIPE.PAYMENTS WHERE CREATED_AT >= '?' AND PAYMENT_STATUS = '?' AND AMOUNT > ?

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN T1.ORDER_STATUS = '?' THEN ? ELSE ? END), AVG(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, MAX(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), COUNT(DISTINCT T1.REGION_ID), STDDEV(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), MIN(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT), T0.CUSTOMER_ID, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', T1.ORDER_DATE)), DATEDIFF(DAY, T0.SIGNUP_DATE, CURRENT_DATE), COUNT(T1.ORDER_ID) FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.CUSTOMER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, T0.CUSTOMER_ID

SELECT FEE_AMOUNT, CREATED_AT, NET_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD, AMOUNT, STRIPE_CHARGE_ID, PAYMENT_ID, DESCRIPTION, PAYMENT_STATUS, CUSTOMER_ID FROM RAW.STRIPE.PAYMENTS WHERE CREATED_AT >= '?' AND PAYMENT_STATUS = '?'
SELECT STRIPE_CHARGE_ID, FAILURE_MESSAGE, METADATA, AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD, UPDATED_AT, DESCRIPTION FROM RAW.STRIPE.PAYMENTS WHERE CREATED_AT >= '?' AND AMOUNT > ?
SELECT NET_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_ID, FAILURE_MESSAGE, FEE_AMOUNT, FAILURE_CODE, AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD, METADATA FROM RAW.STRIPE.PAYMENTS WHERE CREATED_AT >= '?'

SELECT CREATED_AT, PHONE_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, PREFERRED_CHANNEL, CUSTOMER_SEGMENT, LIFETIME_VALUE, BILLING_ADDRESS FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = ?

SELECT UPDATED_AT, LOYALTY_TIER, CUSTOMER_NAME, BILLING_ADDRESS, SIGNUP_DATE, PHONE_NUMBER, EMAIL, ACCOUNT_STATUS, CREATED_AT, CUSTOMER_SEGMENT FROM ANALYTICS.SALES.DIM_CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = ?

AND '?' AND T2.REGION_NAME = '?'

AND '?'

AND '?' AND T2.REGION_NAME = '?'

SELECT T0.UTM_SOURCE, T0.UTM_MEDIUM, T0.UTM_CAMPAIGN, COUNT(DISTINCT T0.SESSION_ID), COUNT(DISTINCT T0.USER_ID), SUM(CASE WHEN T0.CONVERTED THEN ? ELSE ? END), CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T0.CONVERTED THEN ? ELSE ? END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT T0.USER_ID), ?), SUM(T1.TOTAL_AMOUNT) FROM MARKETING.PUBLIC.SESSIONS AS T0 LEFT JOIN ANALYTICS.SALES.FACT_ORDERS AS T1 ON T0.USER_ID = T1.CUSTOMER_ID AND T1.ORDER_DATE = T0.SESSION_DATE WHERE T0.SESSION_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY T0.UTM_SOURCE, T0.UTM_MEDIUM, T0.UTM_CAMPAIGN ORDER BY ATTRIBUTED_REVENUE DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT EVENT_DATE, EVENT_TYPE, PLATFORM, COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM ANALYTICS.PRODUCT.FACT_EVENTS WHERE EVENT_DATE >= DATEADD(DAY, -?, CURRENT_DATE) AND EVENT_TYPE IN ('?', '?', '?', '?') GROUP BY EVENT_DATE, EVENT_TYPE, PLATFORM ORDER BY EVENT_DATE DESC
